caption: A man with a shaved head, a dark beard, and tattoos on his right arm is seated in a studio against a black, ribbed acoustic foam background. He wears a white t-shirt featuring a logo that includes the text "Stay Low" and "NEW YORK". Over his ears are large black headphones, and he is positioned in front of a silver professional microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, looking slightly to his left. His expression shifts slightly as he speaks, with his mouth opening and closing and his gaze subtly shifting, suggesting an active conversation. The lighting remains consistent across the scene, and no other people or objects are visible.
